channel.title: The Governance Frame
channel.description: Immutable Executive GRC Intelligence from the Ironframe System.

item.title: TGF Emerging Threats Notice — July 2, 2026
item.description: Same-day CISA BOD 26-04 deadline pressure on Cisco SD-WAN, post-deadline hunts on collaboration and PLM stacks, coordinated EDR-killer ransomware, and accelerating healthcare extortion activity.

item.title: Institutional Governance Brief: Safeguarding Multi-Tenant Context Isolation in Regulated Healthcare
item.description: An executive assessment of technical boundaries required to maintain absolute patient data isolation across distributed healthcare computing environments.
